name: ClaudOpenAI Universal Skills
description: Static snapshot of the ClaudOpenAI universal skills marketplace. The live, dynamically-generated catalog is served by the bridge Worker at https://registry.marketplace.blazesportsintel.com/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json (sourced from the same D1 backend as the Claude-format catalog at /.claude-plugin/marketplace.json).
note: This file is a placeholder until the bridge Worker (Phase 3) is deployed. Consumers should fetch live_catalog_url for the current catalog. The `plugins` array is intentionally empty here.
